content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Completed the pending t7j amendment on the current tree. In `src/adapters/worktree.rs`, checkpoint construction now captures the pre-staging set of tracked ignored paths from the real index before `git add -A` rewrites the temporary index, then unions that set with the post-staging temp-index ignored paths and `assume-unchanged` paths. The checkpoint builder restores any of those paths that are still tracked in the real index back into the temporary index, and only force-removes paths that have already been explicitly untracked from the real index. That suppresses the bug where deleting or renaming a tracked-but-ignored worktree path leaked an unrelated deletion into checkpoint commits. In `tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs`, regression coverage now includes the deleted tracked-but-gitignored case and asserts the checkpoint keeps the real-index version rather than recording the deletion. Part B remains satisfied on this branch: `result` is not tracked, and there are no remaining tracked ignored paths in the index.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect the current checkpoint ignored-path handling and confirm the pending amendment still required pre-staging tracked ignored-path discovery to avoid deletion leakage for removed or renamed tracked-but-ignored files.
2. [Completed] Update `src/adapters/worktree.rs` so checkpoint creation merges pre-staging real-index tracked ignored paths with post-staging temporary-index ignored paths, then restores still-tracked real-index entries and removes only paths already absent from the real index.
3. [Completed] Extend `tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs` with a regression covering a deleted tracked-but-gitignored file and assert that checkpoint commits preserve the real-index version instead of recording an unrelated deletion.
4. [Completed] Run tracked-ignored index checks plus formatting, linting, focused checkpoint tests, the full requested test suite, and the authoritative `nix build` gate; capture the remaining unrelated failures.

## Validation Evidence

- `git diff --stat -- src/adapters/worktree.rs tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs` reports the intended amendment scope: 68 insertions and 7 deletions across the checkpoint implementation and regression tests.
- `nl -ba src/adapters/worktree.rs | sed -n '137,312p'` shows the amended flow: `tracked_gitignored_paths` reads the real index before staging at lines 150-156, `tracked_gitignored_paths_in_index` reads the temp index at lines 158-168, and `build_checkpoint_tree` unions the preexisting ignored set before restoring tracked entries and removing only absent ones at lines 276-312.
- `nl -ba tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs | sed -n '435,515p'` shows the new regression `worktree_adapter_preserves_real_index_version_for_deleted_tracked_gitignored_paths_in_checkpoint_commits`, which deletes a tracked ignored file before checkpoint creation and asserts the checkpoint still contains the parent content.
- `git ls-files -i -c --exclude-standard` returns no paths on the current branch, confirming there are no remaining tracked ignored files in the real index.
- `git ls-files -- result` returns no output, confirming `result` remains untracked on the current tree.
- `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check` exited 0.
- `nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings` exited 0.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub --test unit worktree_adapter_preserves_real_index_version_for_deleted_tracked_gitignored_paths_in_checkpoint_commits -- --nocapture` exited 0; the new deleted-tracked-gitignored regression passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub --test unit checkpoint_test:: -- --nocapture` exited 0; all 12 checkpoint tests passed, including the new deleted tracked-gitignored case.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` exited 101; the only reported failure was `workflow_engine_test::pre_commit_failure_remediation_survives_resume` at `tests/unit/workflow_engine_test.rs:8917`.
- `nix build --rebuild -L --no-link` exited 1 with `error: some outputs of '/nix/store/k2czqvg78n0n7qyyd8pfa135h84dnplj-ralph-burning-static-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl-0.1.0.drv' are not valid, so checking is not possible`.

## Outstanding Risks

- The required full test suite is still red outside the checkpoint change scope: `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` exits 101 because `workflow_engine_test::pre_commit_failure_remediation_survives_resume` fails at `tests/unit/workflow_engine_test.rs:8917` with `ResumeFailed { reason: "stage review failed: remediation exhausted at cycle 4; maximum supported cycles is 3" }`.
- The authoritative gate is still red outside the checkpoint change scope: `nix build --rebuild -L --no-link` exits 1 with `error: some outputs of '/nix/store/k2czqvg78n0n7qyyd8pfa135h84dnplj-ralph-burning-static-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl-0.1.0.drv' are not valid, so checking is not possible`. Acceptance is not fully met until that passes.
